title: Fix Report Detail Sidebar Not Opening on Row Click
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want clicking a report row to open the detail sidebar, so that I can view report details without the sidebar failing to appear.
description: Bug fix: clicking on a report or dashboard row no longer opened the sidebar detail pane. The click handler was broken, preventing users from viewing report details.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a report/dashboard row opens the sidebar detail pane
Sidebar displays correct details for the selected item
ux_changes: Fixed the click handler to properly open the sidebar detail pane when a row is clicked.
implementation_notes: The click handler was likely broken by a recent change to the table rendering or row selection logic.
comment_summary: Ryan reported the sidebar not opening. Balaji fixed and submitted for review.
